app_strings.listener_unavailable: Unable to open Listener settings on this device.
app_strings.notifications_unavailable: Unable to open app notification settings.
app_strings.live_updates_unavailable: Unable to open Live Updates settings on this device.
app_strings.update_check_failed: Unable to check updates. Try disabling VPN.
app_strings.dictionary_update_failed: Failed to update dictionary from GitHub.
app_strings.dictionary_update_description: downloads the latest parser dictionaries for enabled languages
app_strings.dictionary_editor_description: in-app dictionary editing will be added later
app_strings.copy_old_debug_json_first: please copy your old debug JSON first
app_strings.copy_debug_json_description: copies device, permission, settings, and rules state for bug reports
app_strings.open_github_page_description: opens the GitHub issue page for reporting bugs
app_strings.auto_copy_debug_json_description: copies diagnostics automatically before opening GitHub
app_strings.support_intro_body: Donations are optional and never unlock features. They help cover testing devices and development time.
app_strings.support_method_not_configured: Support method is not configured yet.
app_strings.bug_report_copied: Diagnostics copied to clipboard. Paste it into the issue.
app_strings.update_checks_description: checks GitHub releases and shows an update card when a new version is available
app_strings.apps_load_failed: Unable to load installed apps list.
app_strings.apps_access_message: Allow LiveBridge to read installed apps so you can pick apps for rules?
app_strings.native_progress_description: uses Android progress from notifications when available
app_strings.text_progress_description: detects progress from notification text like 42%
app_strings.otp_codes_description: detects verification codes and shows them in Live Updates
app_strings.auto_copy_code_description: copies detected OTP codes to clipboard automatically
app_strings.remove_original_message_description: tries to hide the original notification after conversion
app_strings.taxi_description: shows taxi ride state as a Live Update
app_strings.deliveries_description: shows delivery progress from food and shopping apps
app_strings.all_apps_description: converts matching notifications from every app
app_strings.only_selected_description: converts notifications only from apps you select
app_strings.exclude_selected_description: converts every app except the apps you select
app_strings.vpns_description: shows active VPN traffic and connection state
app_strings.external_devices_description: shows connected external devices in Live Updates
app_strings.ignore_debugging_devices_description: hides ADB and debugging device notifications
app_strings.media_playback_description: shows track controls and playback status in Live Updates
app_strings.show_media_on_lock_description: allows media Live Updates on the lockscreen
app_strings.use_symbols_in_media_player_description: uses ▶, ⏸, ⏮ and ⏭ instead of text actions
app_strings.calls_description: shows ongoing calls as Live Updates
app_strings.navigation_maps_description: shows the direction and distance in Live Updates
app_strings.weather_broadcasts_description: shows weather alerts and forecast notifications
app_strings.app_language_description: changes the language used by LiveBridge UI
app_strings.keep_alive_foreground_description: uses an alternate foreground mode for stricter firmwares
app_strings.sync_dnd_description: syncs Live Updates behavior with Do Not Disturb
app_strings.prevent_dismissing_description: restores the LiveBridge notification after it is swiped away
app_strings.hide_lockscreen_content_description: shows Content hidden instead of notification text on the lockscreen
app_strings.disable_hints_description: hides info icons and hint popovers across the redesign UI
app_strings.conversion_log_description: keeps recent converted notifications for debugging
app_strings.log_length_description: limits how much conversion log data is kept on device
app_strings.network_speed_description: shows current network traffic as a Live Update
app_strings.network_speed_threshold_description: hides the network speed Live Update below this traffic level
app_strings.xiaomi_hyperisland_description: enables Xiaomi HyperIsland-specific Live Updates behavior
app_strings.aosp_cutting_description: shortens island text on AOSP-like firmwares that clip long content
app_strings.aosp_cutting_length_description: sets the maximum island text length for AOSP cutting
app_strings.update_frequency_description: controls how often animated island text frames are refreshed
app_strings.otp_dedup_description: reduces repeated OTP notifications from the same source
app_strings.animated_island_description: adds smooth island text animations for supported conversions

android.notification_permission_in_progress: Notification permission request is already in progress
android.error_failed_to_load_conversion_log_page: Failed to load conversion log page
android.error_save_livebridge_settings_backup: Unable to save LiveBridge settings backup
android.error_app_overrides_save_failed: Unable to save app overrides to Downloads
android.error_dictionary_save_failed: Unable to save dictionary to Downloads
android.keep_alive_notification_body: Keep this notification here for LiveBridge stability
android.keep_alive_channel_description: Keep this notification here to use LiveBridge
android.network_speed_channel_description: Shows current network speed in the status bar
android.mirror_channel_smart_description: Taxi, deliveries and similar smart conversions
android.mirror_channel_calls_description: Active calls with elapsed call time
